name: marshal-suite
description: The Merge Marshal — a serial, deterministic composed-state merge backstop. The fourth Zero-Trust Verification plugin (ADR 0011): wiring, not a checker. Installable alone on any ordinary shared repo.

plugins.name: marshal
plugins.description: Serial, deterministic merge backstop: FIFO over ready+approved PRs, rebase-or-refuse per the D7.0 budget, build-status on the post-rebase head (the composed-state verification), green->merge / red->evict, one PR in flight. Host-agnostic (GitHub + Bitbucket DC). Bundles the vendored claim-overlap check and the 48h branch-age watcher.
